supervisor_prompt:
plan:
  I want to run `just demos` to run the our app where I will be able to switch examples by
  pressing keys 1-6 (corresponding to current `just ex 1-6`. Ther'll be new "dummy" example
  0 that will be just empty window with nothing (to compare how HW resource will change
  dependeing on individual examples). Also on pressing `k` key, keynindings/key hints will
  show for each examples simialry to current dat with f/g key. But, instead of drawing
  current hw datat into window title, I want you to draw it to overlay directly to the
  renderred content. Data standardly shown after pressink `f` will be display autoamtically
  by default. All examples together with overlays need to run in browser as well. Once done,
  verify all examples - you should be able to make screenshots of any example in both
  native and browser environemtn and also you should be able to switch example
  programitcally in both native window and browser (like user would do with numbers) so you
  can reuse one native windows and one chromium tab for all needed testing.
